data.name: 露西成人遊戲
data.detailed_description:
My new game !

On a paradise island : Play 2 MC ! A girl and a boy ! : Wheel of desire...

Looking for Corrupted Paradise on Steam !


關於此遊戲

About Training Lucie


You play as a man who must take in a young intern, Lucie, as a favor to her best friend, Zoe.
Help Lucie to discover her sexuality, and help your colleague Claire to get out of the clutches of an odious sexual blackmail
Define your loyalty to Lucie and you can discover a personalized ending.
Can you save your girls from the clutches of their new boss Pascal ?

Why play Lucie ? => Realism above all!


  • All the events in the game are "possible" in real life. (No, all girls don't have sex the moment you look at them.)
  • An unparalleled rise in desire like Babysitters game.
  • Careful dialogues, without superfluous and unnecessary things.
  • A complex plot. (Blackmail, infiltration, investigation, soft bondage, public exhibition)
  • Great care has been taken for the noises and music.
  • Translation made by a native American and 2 people are reviewing the english version.
  • Many details in each render, including videogame cultural references and jokes.
  • Your choices are key. You can choose either to romance or corrupt your intern Lucie. There are 4 endings.
  • Progressive and exponential sex scene reward.
  • Humor in renders, in dialogues...

"Lucie Adult Game" is a first-person POV adult adventure where you control the Male Main Character.
Lucie is the only love interest.
However you can (or not) fuck several other girls.

data.short_description: Lucie Adult Game is a realistic visual novel set in the corporate world. Through a very hot story, live your romance with Lucie the way you want. Loyal or not, a personalized ending awaits you.Laugh, flirt, and live unique and original situationsPlayable as a couple or solo !
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 10, 11
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz core duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or directX 9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz core duo
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0-capable graphics card/integrated GPU
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
